warm_up:
Activation & Mobilisation Drills:
1 round
Warm Up
10 Scap Push Ups
10 scap Pull ups
10 x Inch Worms
10 I-Y-T-W
10 toe walks
10 heel walks
Wrist Mobilisation

metcon.name: Workout
metcon.description:
8 min AMRAP
20 Double Unders
2 HSPU
20 Double Unders
3 HSPU
20 Double Unders
4 HSPU
20 Double Unders
5 HSPU
20 Double Unders
6 HSPU
20 Double unders
etc

gymnastics:
Double Under Progression
Even Min Singles - focus on jumping higher
Odd Mins Penguin Clap Drill
Double Under attempts -
Double - single - single - single - Double
for the DU Experts - go for max sets every 2-3 mins
HSPU Progression
EMOM  x4 20-30 sec wall facing handstand hold
EMOM x 4 DB Z Press
EMOM x 2 - Find your Tripod
EMOM x 4 - 6-10 Box Pikes (High Hips)
EMOM x 4 - Pick one -
Box Pike
Tempo Box Pike
Strict HSPU
Deficit Strict HSPU
EMOM x 5 - Kipping drive against wall
- lay on the ground - explosive hips up to wall
EMOM x 4 Kipping HSPU

hypertrophy.reasoning: Back and biceps work antagonistically to heavy pressing; glutes provide posterior chain balance without CNS competition.

siri_text: Thursday's workout. Gymnastics: Double Under Progression. Metcon: AMRAP 8 minutes: 20 Double Unders, 2 HSPU, 20 Double Unders, 3 HSPU, 20 Double Unders. For hypertrophy, focus on back, biceps, glutes.
